question: What is the orientation of the shadows cast by the bricks?
gold_answer: Behind the tower and slightly to the left.
answer_choices: Behind the tower and slightly to the left.
Upward and toward the right, not very long.

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: Bright light source from front-right, casting short shadows to the left and slightly forward.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Dark background with no visible light source, long shadows extending behind and to the left.

inpaint_prompt_used: Bright light source from front-right, casting short shadows to the left and slightly forward.
negative_prompt_used: Dark background with no visible light source, long shadows extending behind and to the left.
